title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
